case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

  "ordering": "window asc, modality metrics->traces->logs, abs(dev) desc within a window/modality",

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-60s currencyservice metrics. Latency.p50 dev=+2.4 and latency.p90 dev=+0.4 persist across windows. Traces show high call counts (dev=+1.4) and latency.p99 dev=+1.2. Confirms currencyservice latency as root cause over checkoutservice cpu.
